tasks.label: stop-dev-server
args: $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($null -eq $conn) { Write-Output 'No process is listening on port 3000.' } else { $pid = $conn.OwningProcess; Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force; Write-Output \"Stopped process $pid on port 3000.\" }

tasks.label: stop-dev-server
args: $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($null -eq $conn) { Write-Output 'No process is listening on port 3000.' } else { $procId = $conn.OwningProcess; Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force; Write-Output \"Stopped process $procId on port 3000.\" }
